item.title: Creating an inventory
item.description:
I was organizing some bathroom items when I found an item I thought I did not have and bought recently an item, so I have duplicated. Today and in other previous times, I have thought about some app to manage the inventory, so I could avoid these things.

Some time ago I thought about creating an inventory app to run as PWA and that can be used offline from mobile using some persistence mechanism in the browser.

Searching, I have found a self-hosted app that can be used from mobile too. It has no PWA feature or offline usage but I think it could be useful to me as starting point to create the inventory. This allows exporting to CSV so I could migrate the data.

The app is called Homebox and it has the minimal requirements for me as nested storage location and other cool features.
item.author: Antonio Gutiérrez (iamdesvela@gmail.com)

item.title: markdown support and test variable interpolation
item.description:
Markdown Features Sample

Headings

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 5
Heading 6

Emphasis

  • Italic
  • Bold
  • Bold & Italic
  • ~~Strikethrough~~

Lists

Unordered List

  • Item A
  • Item B
  • Nested item

Ordered List

  1. First
  2. Second
  3. Third

Links

Microsoft

Images

Code

Inline code: print("Hello")

Code block:

def greet():
  return "Hello"

Blockquotes

This is a blockquote.

Tables

Product Price Stock
Pen 1€ Yes
Notebook 3€ No

Horizontal Rule

Task Lists

  • [x] Add markdown features
  • [ ] Review
  • [ ] Finalize

Escaping Characters

Use \* to show a literal asterisk.

Footnotes

Here is a sentence with a footnote.1

Inline HTML

This is an inline HTML example.

Más info en mi web

Testing template string:

my_var: VAR from metadata

file_path: feeds/2026-03-06_16-18-50.md

file_name: 2026-03-06_16-18-50.md

file_dir: feeds

file_ext: .md

gh_repo_source_base_url: https://github.com/Desvelao/social-network/tree/main

gh_owner: Desvelao

gh_repo: social-network

gh_pages_base_url: https://desvelao.github.io/social-network

gh_repo_source_base_url: https://github.com/Desvelao/social-network/tree/main

  1. This is the footnote text. ↩
item.author: Antonio Gutiérrez (iamdesvela@gmail.com)

item.title: Roshan, new home!
item.description: Roshan, a Dota 2 Discord bot, got a new home after a long time. New interactions update v0.4.0-alpha1 is available in the development server.
item.author: Antonio Gutiérrez (iamdesvela@gmail.com)
